name: midwaymetals.com.vn
message: [AI generated] Midway Metals Vietnam is a manufacturing company specializing in stainless steel products. Based in Vietnam, it is a fully owned subsidiary of the Australian-owned Midway Metals. The company is known for utilizing modern technology and innovation to produce a wide range of high-quality stainless steel products such as flat bars, round bars, and angles, serving various industries.
